CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT, value BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_values VALUES (1, TRUE), (2, FALSE), (3, TRUE), (4, FALSE);
SELECT id, diff(value, (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE id = 1)) AS is_different FROM test_values;
SELECT id, diff(value, (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE id = 2)) AS is_different FROM test_values;
CREATE TABLE partitioned_values (part_id INT, value BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO partitioned_values VALUES (1, TRUE), (1, FALSE), (2, TRUE);
SELECT part_id, diff(value, (SELECT value FROM partitioned_values WHERE part_id = 1)) AS is_different FROM partitioned_values;
SELECT part_id, diff(value, (SELECT AVG(value::INTEGER) FROM partitioned_values GROUP BY part_id)) AS is_different FROM partitioned_values;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (id INT, flag BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO multi_table VALUES (1, TRUE), (2, FALSE), (3, TRUE);
SELECT m.id, diff(m.flag, t.value) AS flag_difference FROM multi_table m JOIN test_values t ON m.id = t.id;
SELECT t.id, diff(m.flag, (SELECT value FROM test_values t2 WHERE t2.id = t.id)) AS flag_difference FROM multi_table m JOIN test_values t ON m.id = t.id;
SELECT id, diff(value, (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE id IN (1, 2))) AS is_different FROM test_values;
